learnings: validation concerns surfaced while implementing overflow behavior

proposed_adjustments.title: Add validation scope
proposed_adjustments.description: Expand the caching discovery milestone to validate malformed CLI input assumptions before recommendation sign-off.
proposed_adjustments.reason: Formatter implementation exposed input-shape risks that should be assessed before downstream work.

proposed_adjustments.title: Debt cleanup from formatter shortcuts
proposed_adjustments.description: Create a small follow-up milestone to remove shortcuts taken during formatter delivery.
proposed_adjustments.reason: The current milestone delivered value, but it created cleanup work that should stay visible.
